cards.title: Add test suite to Productivity Tool dashboard
cards.body: 81 source files have zero test coverage. With daily commits and API routes managing critical state (activity, day-plan, automation), this is a regression risk. Start with Jest for API routes and Playwright for the main UI. Target 3-5 tests for critical paths, then expand.

cards.title: Stage uncommitted changes and enforce documentation-with-commits
cards.body: 8 files currently uncommitted (likely documentation + code split). Review DOC-UPDATE-NEEDED.md, consolidate CHANGELOG-PENDING.md into CHANGELOG.md, then stage and commit all changes together. This enforces the documentation-with-commits protocol required by project rules and prevents future fragmentation.

cards.title: Clear stale changelog backlog (46 lines, 6 days old)
cards.body: CHANGELOG-PENDING.md has accumulated 46 unpublished entries since 2026-04-09. Consolidate into CHANGELOG.md with a single dated entry summarizing the batch. Establish weekly or per-milestone consolidation to prevent future buildup.
